items.title: Review Engramme term sheet and round structure details from Gabriel
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: Subject 'Engramme: round structure and term sheet' — founder shared round structure and term sheet details. Previous next_steps noted 'Waiting for founders to confirm TS first.'

items.title: Review Unstructured Series C VC Tracker spreadsheet and assess positioning
items.context: Email from brian@unstructured.io on Jun 2: Shared 'Series_C_VC_Tracker_May2026' spreadsheet as editor — Series C process appears active, aligning with previous next_steps that 'Series C will kick off after closing Q1.'

items.title: Follow up on Opti call with Barak Perelman and capture next steps
items.context: Email thread Jun 2-3: Richie sent meeting invite for 2pm ET on Jun 2 to Barak (barakp@opti.ai). Barak replied Jun 3 confirming. Deal is in Deep Diligence — need to debrief on meeting and confirm LP intro pipeline.

items.title: Follow up with Boris on Blast Security fundraise status post-Shabbat dinner
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4 replying to Richie's touch base about Cybersecurity Shabbat Dinner (5/29). Deal status: Partner Meetings, currently raising. Need to capture any commitments or next steps from the dinner follow-up.
